name: @plone/scripts
description: Volto Core scripts package - Contains scripts and dependencies for these scripts for tooling when developing Plone 6 / Volto

scripts.stylelint:fix: sh -c 'if [ -f .stylelintrc ] || [ -f .stylelintrc.json ] || [ -f .stylelintrc.js ] || [ -f .stylelintrc.cjs ] || [ -f stylelint.config.js ] || [ -f stylelint.config.cjs ] || [ -f stylelint.config.mjs ]; then stylelint '''./**/*.{css,scss,less}''' --fix --allow-empty-input; else echo "No local stylelint config, skipping"; fi'
scripts.format: pnpm prettier:fix && pnpm lint:fix && pnpm stylelint:fix
